actual_cohere_calls_completed_rows: sum of per-case logical calls for completed rows only
actual_cohere_calls_run_level: run-global logical calls consumed from cap enforcer snapshot/inference
global_cap_reached: true when run-level consumed >= effective cap
effective_call_cap: configured max total logical Cohere calls
call_accounting_warning: non-empty when completed-row calls differ from run-level consumption
